item.title: The Kids Aren’t Alright: Rights Groups Warn of Mounting Pressure on Children in Russia - The Moscow...
item.description: The Kids Aren’t Alright: Rights Groups Warn of Mounting Pressure on Children in Russia  The Moscow TimesRussia: Schools have turned into “factories of compliance” through state indoctrination and surveillance of children  Amnesty International“Only Official Sources”: Indoctrination in the Russian Educational System  Amnesty International USARussian schools are testing students' attitudes toward Stalin and Lenin  UA.NEWSChildren are being monitored and indoctrinated in Russian classrooms – new report  Amnesty International UK

item.title: Exclusive: EU aiming to advance Ukraine's membership slightly faster than planned - The Kyiv Indepen...

item.title: Archaeologists find Queen Elisenda’s remains among 25 medieval skeletons, including individuals with...
item.description: Archaeologists find Queen Elisenda’s remains among 25 medieval skeletons, including individuals with unexplained stab wounds  Archaeology News Online MagazineSkeletal remains of Queen Elisenda, one of the most powerful rulers in medieval Europe, unearthed in Barcelona — along with several others who bore unexplained stab wounds  Live ScienceQueen Elisenda’s tomb among key discoveries in Pedralbes Investigation  HeritageDailyThe DNA reveals the silenced chronicle of Pedralbes  Diari ARAA queen’s tomb hid a secret for 700 years until science opened it  Diario AS

item.title: Russia’s $30m terror missile keeps missing - Euromaidan Press
item.description: Russia’s $30m terror missile keeps missing  Euromaidan PressRussian Oreshnik missile fired in January was nine years old, Ukrainian experts say  ReutersExclusive: Design of the Oreshnik Missile’s Submunitions Revealed  МілітарнийForget about the "Hazel Tree": Russia has a more dangerous weapon — Budanov*  EADailyVladimir Putin humiliated after 'unstoppable' hypersonic missile blows up OWN troops in malfunction  GB News
